code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
        out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b + 32 - 2 * (b % 32 / 26 * 32))}"
      else
        out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
